topWPAPlays.description: Junior Caminero homers (17) on a fly ball to left field. Jonathan Aranda scores.
Victor Mesa Jr. homers (3) on a fly ball to right field. Cedric Mullins scores. Taylor Walls scores.
Carter Jensen called out on strikes.
Jonathan Aranda singles on a ground ball to left fielder Isaac Collins.
Isaac Collins called out on strikes.
Julio Rodríguez grounds into a double play, third baseman Nick Gonzales to second baseman Tyler Callihan to first baseman Ryan O'Hearn. J.P. Crawford out at 2nd. Julio Rodríguez out at 1st.
Henry Davis homers (6) on a fly ball to right center field. Jared Triolo scores.
J.P. Crawford singles on a ground ball to right fielder Esmerlyn Valdez. Mitch Garver scores. Colt Emerson to 3rd.
Rob Refsnyder flies out to left fielder Bryan Reynolds.
Colt Emerson grounds into a force out, fielded by shortstop Jared Triolo. Mitch Garver out at 2nd.
Jung Hoo Lee triples (3) on a line drive to center fielder Henry Bolte. Bryce Eldridge scores. Casey Schmitt scores. Willy Adames scores.
Lawrence Butler singles on a line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee. Tyler Soderstrom scores. Jonah Heim to 3rd.
Jonah Heim singles on a ground ball to left fielder Victor Bericoto. Henry Bolte scores. Tyler Soderstrom to 2nd.
Alika Williams doubles (6) on a line drive to left fielder Victor Bericoto. Jeff McNeil scores.
Willy Adames homers (14) on a fly ball to left center field.
Colt Keith grounds into a double play, first baseman Christian Walker to shortstop Jeremy Peña. Riley Greene out at 2nd. Colt Keith out at 1st.
Taylor Trammell homers (2) on a fly ball to right field.
Riley Greene singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Cam Smith.
Kevin McGonigle grounds out to first baseman Christian Walker.
Dillon Dingler homers (19) on a fly ball to center field.
Bryce Harper homers (18) on a fly ball to left center field. Garrett Stubbs scores.
Brandon Marsh walks. Trea Turner scores. Kyle Schwarber to 3rd. Bryce Harper to 2nd.
Daylen Lile doubles (17) on a line drive to right fielder Derek Hill.
J.T. Realmuto grounds out, third baseman Curtis Mead to first baseman Andrés Chaparro.
Bryce Harper walks. Justin Crawford scores. Trea Turner to 3rd. Kyle Schwarber to 2nd.
Wyatt Langford homers (8) on a fly ball to left center field. Nicky Lopez scores. Joc Pederson scores.
Myles Straw doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Alejandro Osuna. Alejandro Kirk scores. Nathan Lukes scores.
Joc Pederson homers (12) on a fly ball to right field.
Jake Burger homers (14) on a fly ball to left field. Corey Seager scores.
Kazuma Okamoto homers (18) on a fly ball to center field. Ernie Clement scores.
Pete Crow-Armstrong doubles (13) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Carson Benge. Matt Shaw scores.
Jared Young homers (6) on a fly ball to right center field.
Eric Wagaman homers (2) on a fly ball to left field. A.J. Ewing scores.
Carson Benge grounds out sharply, third baseman Alex Bregman to first baseman Michael Busch.
Eric Wagaman lines out to left fielder Ian Happ.
Caleb Durbin homers (6) on a fly ball to left field. Willson Contreras scores.

Willson Contreras reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Amed Rosario. Masataka Yoshida scores. Ceddanne Rafaela to 3rd. Willson Contreras to 2nd. Fielding error by third baseman Amed Rosario.
José Caballero homers (8) on a line drive to left center field.
Anthony Seigler hits a ground-rule double (3) on a fly ball down the left-field line. Jarren Duran to 3rd.
Carlos Narváez strikes out swinging.
